description: Visualize any codebase or document set as an interactive D3 force-directed knowledge graph — entities, relationships, and semantic clusters powered by OpenAI embeddings.
features: Interactive D3 force-directed graph with drag, pan, and zoom
Pre-baked household knowledge graph (agents, tools, infra, wiki docs)
OpenAI gpt-4o-mini entity + relationship extraction from any text
Node detail panel with incoming/outgoing relationships
Ad-hoc custom text analysis — paste code or docs to build a new graph
